launch.note: Your intro post. Post this first, then pin it to the top of your profile.
launch.caption:
PropSight is live. The free way to see Singapore property clearly.

Value any HDB or condo on real recent sales. Work out what you can truly afford. Dig into deep research on every project and town. Read the news that actually matters, in plain English.

And Aillie, your property intelligence, answers anything, anytime.

Start free at propsight.sg (link in bio). Join free to unlock the full research, a weekly newsletter and live market signals.

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdb #condosingapore #propertyinvestment
launch.alt: PropSight on a laptop and a phone, free Singapore property intelligence at propsight.sg

posts.note: Start of the week, strongest reach. A hook or myth to stop the scroll.
posts.caption:
Real value of any home in Singapore, free
PropSight shows you what a home is actually worth, your true budget, the hidden costs most buyers forget, and the schools nearby, all in one place.
One tab before you make an offer or list. No agent, no guessing, just real property intelligence.
Check yours free at propsight.sg (link in bio)
#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdbresale #condosingapore #propertyinvestment
posts.alt: Know what a home is really worth

posts.note: Midweek. A market read, insight or news story people save and share.
posts.caption:
HDB resale flats are out-earning condos for landlords right now.
Rental yield is the story, not the price tag.
Condo prices are holding steady, led by the suburbs and the city fringe.
HDB resale is holding steady too, so sellers, you have time.
Check your own numbers free at propsight.sg (link in bio)
#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdbresale #rentalyield #condosingapore
posts.alt: Market insight, Resale flats are out-earning condos for landlords

posts.note: Friday feed. A striking photo post pulls in reach.
posts.caption:
A 4-room HDB in Tampines is about $710k right now.
That is the resale number from real recent sales, not a guess.
Before you list or lowball an offer, know what your own flat is actually worth.
Free for any HDB or condo, takes a minute.
Check yours free at propsight.sg (link in bio)
#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdbresale #hdb #tampines

posts.note: Weekend scroll. A quick tool or tip people act on.
posts.caption:
Earn $10,000 a month? Here's the home that fits.

On a 25-year loan at 75% financing, that stretches to about $1.39M. Your savings and age move the number.

Find your number free at propsight.sg (link in bio).

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #sgproperty #homeloan #affordability
